name: Pancakes Griddle Cakes or Batter Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour before measuring.
2. Resift with the salt, sugar, and baking powder.
3. Beat the eggs lightly and combine with the melted butter and milk.
4. Mix the liquid ingredients quickly into the sifted ingredients.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours (the longer the better).
6. Preheat the griddle until a drop of cold water skitters about on the surface for several seconds before evaporating.
7. Use a tablespoon to gently spoon the batter onto the griddle.
8. When bubbles appear on the top, check the underside to see if they are done.
9. Turn when golden brown. The second side will take only about half as long to cook as the first.
10. Serve hot with syrup, bacon, sausages, etc.
